title: Multi-finger gesture: 3-finger swipe to switch app workspaces
design_brief: 3-finger horizontal swipe to switch workspace.

title: Sheet with persistent footer offering cancel
design_brief: Sheet with sticky cancel button at bottom in addition to drag-down.

title: FlashList with batch processing
design_brief: Heavy items per row — chunk rendering with InteractionManager.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: All heavy mount on initial render

title: Inline form errors with subtle animation
design_brief: Field errors animate in beneath field. Reference: rn-017 pattern.

title: App scheme deep linking from external sources
design_brief: Custom scheme (myapp://) for sharing internal links.
mobile_reasoning: Configure scheme in app.json; Expo Router handles.

title: Animated tab indicator with bounce
design_brief: Tab indicator slides with subtle bounce overshoot.
solution: // Spring config tweak on rn-072\nimport {withSpring} from 'react-native-reanimated';\n// damping: 12 for overshoot

title: Generative art background per user
design_brief: Each user gets a unique generative pattern based on their ID hash.
mobile_reasoning: Deterministic seed from user ID; Skia draws pattern.

title: Crop overlay with grid (rule of thirds)
design_brief: Crop tool shows rule-of-thirds grid.
mobile_reasoning: Skia lines or Views drawing thirds.

title: Map with cluster expansion on tap
design_brief: Tap cluster → expands to show individual markers.
mobile_reasoning: On cluster tap, animate camera to zoom to cluster bounds.

title: Funnel chart
design_brief: Funnel chart: steps with progressively narrower bars.

title: Concrete brutalism: blocky, gray, monumental
design_brief: Heavy gray blocks with stark contrast.
mobile_reasoning: Gray palette + sharp corners + heavy weight.

title: App icon long-press quick actions handler
design_brief: Handle iOS Quick Actions / Android shortcuts when app launches via shortcut.
mobile_reasoning: Listen to launch params; route accordingly.

title: VoiceOver focus management in modals
design_brief: On modal open, focus moves to first focusable element.

title: Avoid re-creating Date objects in render
design_brief: Date.now() in render creates new objects each cycle.
mobile_reasoning: Memoize relative time strings or update on interval.
solution: // useRelativeTime.ts\nimport {useState, useEffect} from 'react';\nexport function useRelativeTime(timestamp: number) { const [text, setText] = useState(''); useEffect(() => { const update = () => { const diff = Date.now() - timestamp; if (diff < 60000) setText('just now'); else if (diff < 3600000) setText(`${Math.floor(diff/60000)}m`); else setText(`${Math.floor(diff/3600000)}h`); }; update(); const id = setInterval(update, 60000); return () => clearInterval(id); }, [timestamp]); return text; }

title: Photo upload sheet with multi-file progress
design_brief: Sheet showing multiple uploads with individual progress bars.
mobile_reasoning: Per-file progress tracked in state Map.

title: Map with bottom search bar that drives results
design_brief: Search bar at bottom + results drawn as markers.
mobile_reasoning: Search returns coords; markers added via setState.

title: Histogram with bar tap details
design_brief: Histogram showing distribution; tap bar for details.

title: Drag handle pulse to indicate draggability
design_brief: Drag handle subtly pulses on first appearance to indicate it's draggable.

title: Animated favicon-style logo loader
design_brief: Logo morphs through brand colors while loading.

title: Image processing in worker (off main thread)
design_brief: Heavy image manipulation runs in a Reanimated worklet.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Blocking main thread for image manipulation
mobile_reasoning: Skia operations on UI thread via worklets.

title: Search history dropdown
design_brief: Tap search field shows recent searches.

title: Cinematic / film stock palette
design_brief: Color palette evoking film stock (warm shadows, cool highlights).
mobile_reasoning: Custom palette + Skia LUT filter on images.

title: Spring scale on tap (button press feedback)
design_brief: Subtle scale-down on press for any tappable card.

title: Adaptive sheet (modal on phone, popover on tablet)
design_brief: Same content shown as sheet on phone, popover on tablet.

title: FlashList with snap to grid
design_brief: Horizontal FlashList that snaps to grid cells.
solution: // See rn-213\nimport {FlashList} from '@shopify/flash-list';\nexport function GridSnapList(props: any) { return <FlashList {...props} horizontal snapToInterval={props.itemWidth} decelerationRate='fast'/>; }

title: Phone-style PIN entry with auto-submit
design_brief: 6-digit PIN; auto-submits on last digit.

title: Drag-to-reorder visual cue
design_brief: As item is dragged for reorder, slot above/below shows insertion line.
mobile_reasoning: Compute insertion slot during drag; show line.
interaction_details: Line shows where item will land

title: Aurora gradient background
design_brief: Northern lights aesthetic background with slow color drift.
mobile_reasoning: Skia LinearGradient with multiple stops; stop positions shift.

title: Bundle size: tree-shaking heavy imports
design_brief: Avoid importing whole library when only one function needed.
mobile_reasoning: Use direct path imports for tree-shaking.

title: Animated GIF preview before posting
design_brief: Preview GIF before sending in chat.
